title: cynoglossum clandestinum
intro: Cynoglossum clandestinum, also known as Chinese forget-me-not or Chinese forget-me-not vine, is an herbaceous perennial vine that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Cynoglossum clandestinum include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
